Name: BCA Everyday Card
description: Entry-level card for daily shopping and bills.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 3% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: IDR 40,000; Replacement card:IDR 50,000 (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Reward BCA, installments, merchant discounts

Name: BCA Card Platinum
description: Premium BCA Card with higher spending capacity.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: IDR 40,000 (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Reward BCA, installments, higher limit privileges

Name: BCA Visa Batman
description: Visa card with Batman-themed design.
fees: Same as BCA Visa Classic: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit IDR 40,000
benefits & features: Reward BCA, Visa benefits, promotions

Name: BCA Visa Black
description: Premium Visa card for high-spending customers.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: Free; Replacement card:Free (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Visa privileges, travel benefits, Reward BCA

Name: BCA Mastercard Globe
description: Lifestyle Mastercard for everyday and overseas use.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: IDR 40,000 (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Mastercard benefits, Reward BCA

Name: BCA Mastercard Black
description: Premium Mastercard with lifestyle and travel privileges.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: Free; Replacement card:Free (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Travel benefits, Reward BCA, promotions

Name: BCA Mastercard World
description: World Mastercard with premium travel privileges.
fees: Late fee: 1% (max IDR 100,000); Cash advance: 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit: Free; Replacement card:Free (www.bca.co.id)
benefits & features: Concierge, airport lounge, travel perks

Name: BCA JCB Black
description: Premium JCB card with Japan-focused privileges.
fees: Same premium fee schedule: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit Free
benefits & features: JCB Plaza Lounge, Japan offers

Name: BCA UnionPay
description: UnionPay card optimized for Asia and China.
fees: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit IDR 40,000
benefits & features: UnionPay acceptance, promotions

Name: BCA Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer Visa Signature
description: Earn KrisFlyer miles through spending.
fees: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit Free
benefits & features: KrisFlyer miles, travel insurance

Name: BCA Singapore Airlines KrisFlyer Visa Infinite
description: Premium airline card with accelerated KrisFlyer miles.
fees: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit Free
benefits & features: Faster miles, premium travel benefits

Name: BCA Singapore Airlines PPS Club Visa Infinite
description: Premium card for PPS Club members.
fees: Premium fee schedule
benefits & features: Airline privileges, concierge

Name: BCA tiket.com Mastercard
description: Travel rewards card with tiket.com benefits.
fees: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit IDR 40,000
benefits & features: tiket.com discounts, Reward BCA

Name: BCA Blibli Mastercard
description: Shopping card with Blibli rewards.
fees: Late fee 1%; Cash advance 4% (min IDR 40,000); Overlimit IDR 40,000
benefits & features: Blibli promotions, Reward BCA

Name: BCA American Express Platinum
description: Invitation-only premium American Express card.
fees: Premium fee schedule
benefits & features: Airport lounges, concierge, luxury travel

Name: KPR Pembelian
description: Home purchase loan for new or old houses, shophouses, and apartments.
price: Promotional fixed rate from 4.39% eff.p.a. (limited-time offer; standard/floating rate is approximately 11% p.a. after the promo period)
fees: Provision fee: 1%; Admin fee: IDR 500k+; Appraisal fee: IDR 1.1M-1.5M; Penalty: 0.2%/day.
requirements: ID Card, NPWP, Salary Slip, Bank Statements, Property Documents.
benefits & features: Low down payment, fixed installments, partnered with trusted developers.

Name: KPR Refinancing
description: Easy and fast financial solution to get funds from BCA with property as collateral.
fees: Provision fee: 1%; Admin fee: IDR 500k+; Appraisal fee: IDR 1.1M-1.5M; Penalty: 0.2%/day.
requirements: ID Card, NPWP, Salary Slip, Bank Statements, Property Documents.
benefits & features: Penalty Free (except for some fixed terms), Online submission, Loan Top Up.

Name: KPR Renovasi
description: Solution for expanding or renovating a house to create a new atmosphere at home.
fees: Provision fee: 1%; Admin fee: IDR 500k+; Appraisal fee: IDR 1.1M-1.5M; Penalty: 0.2%/day.
limits: Minimum Tenor 8 years (for the 3-year fixed rate option).
requirements: ID Card, NPWP, Salary Slip, Bank Statements, Property Documents, Renovation Budget Plan (RAB).
benefits & features: Penalty Free, Online submission, Loan Top Up.

Name: KPR BCA Take Over
description: Transfer existing mortgage from another bank with the option to add extra credit.
fees: Provision fee: 0.25%; Admin fee: Free; Appraisal fee: IDR 1.1M-1.5M; Penalty: 0.2%/day.
limits: Loan tenure up to 20 years; loan amount based on the remaining balance of the mortgage being taken over (a specific IDR 1B–10B range is not confirmed on official pages).
requirements: Existing KPR active for at least 2 years, clean payment record for 12 months.
benefits & features: Competitive interest rates, flexible remaining tenor, option to top up loan.

Name: BCA Secured Personal Loan
description: Investment-backed secured credit facility.
fees: Provision fee: 0.5%; Admin fee: IDR 500k - 3M; Penalty: 0.2%/day.
limits: Financing up to 90% of collateral value.
requirements: Indonesian citizen, age 18-65, own ORI/SR/FR bonds.
benefits & features: Meet liquidity needs without selling investments, no appraisal.

Name: BCA Personal Loan
description: Unsecured loan (KTA) for various needs.
fees: Provision fee: 1% (min IDR 100k); Late fee: 0.28%/day; Early repayment: IDR 200k.
benefits & features: No collateral, simple process, light payment.
min_apply: Min income IDR 2.5M or 2M depending on region.

Name: KKB BCA
description: Financing for new/used cars or refinancing BPKB.
fees: Provision fee 1%; Fiduciary fee IDR 300k–2M (scales with loan size, up to 2M for loans over IDR 1B); Admin varies
requirements: Age 21–64, min income ≥ 3x installment, 2 years employment
benefits & features: Fixed installments, refinancing, flexible tenor, EV options

Name: KSM BCA
description: Loan for new/used motorcycles with fast approval.
price: ~9% flat p.a. standard rate (promotional rates as low as 2.15–2.66% flat p.a. may apply)
fees: Admin fee included; Insurance bundled
limits: Up to ~IDR 100M (varies by promo and vehicle type)
requirements: Age 21–55, Indonesian citizen, stable income or existing BCA customer
benefits & features: Fast approval, bundled insurance, simple process

Name: BCA Debit Card (GPN)
description: Standard debit card linked to BCA savings account for local transactions.
price: IDR 20,000 issuance fee (flat rate per BCA's January 2025 fee update)
fees: ATM withdrawal fee outside BCA network; transfer fees apply
benefits & features: ATM withdrawals, QRIS payments, interbank transfer, card-based payments

Name: BCA Mastercard Debit
description: International debit card for global ATM and online payments.
price: IDR 20,000 issuance fee (flat rate per BCA's January 2025 fee update)
fees: Foreign ATM fee, FX conversion fee (~2–3%)
benefits & features: Global ATM access, online shopping, Mastercard global acceptance

Name: BCA Gold Debit (Tahapan Gold)
description: Debit card issued with the Tahapan Gold premium savings account.
price: IDR 20,000 issuance fee (flat rate per BCA's January 2025 fee update)
fees: Lower transaction fees than standard cards
requirements: Requires an active Tahapan Gold account (minimum average monthly balance IDR 10,000,000)
benefits & features: Higher limits, priority banking access, better service tiers
min_apply: Open Tahapan Gold account (min. avg. balance IDR 10,000,000/month)

Name: BCA Xpresi Debit Card
description: Youth-oriented debit card with customizable design.
fees: Standard ATM/transfer fees
benefits & features: Custom card design, mobile banking integration, QRIS payments

Name: Tahapan BCA
description: Standard savings account for daily banking needs.
price: IDR 14,000–20,000 admin/month depending on tier (GPN Blue to Mastercard Platinum)
fees: Admin fee applies monthly regardless of balance tier
benefits & features: ATM access, mobile banking, debit card linked, QRIS payments

Name: Tahapan Xpresi
description: Savings account designed for students and young users.
fees: ATM & transfer fees apply
benefits & features: Custom debit card design, mobile-first banking, QRIS

Name: Tahapan Gold
description: High-tier savings account with better service and limits.
price: IDR 25,000 admin/month if average balance falls below the minimum
fees: Lower fees for premium users
requirements: Minimum average monthly balance of IDR 10,000,000
benefits & features: Priority banking, higher limits, better service tier

Name: BCA Dollar Account
description: Savings account in USD/SGD for foreign currency holding.
fees: FX conversion fees apply
benefits & features: Hold foreign currency, hedge FX risk, international transfers

Name: ORI / SBN (Government Bonds)
description: Retail government bonds issued by Indonesia offering fixed returns.
fees: No subscription fee (secondary market fees may apply)
benefits & features: Fixed income, low risk, government-backed security

Name: Deposito Berjangka (Time Deposit)
description: Savings product with fixed interest over a locked period.
fees: Early withdrawal penalty applies
benefits & features: Guaranteed interest, low risk, predictable returns

Name: Bancassurance BCA
description: Combined insurance + investment product for long-term financial planning.
fees: Insurance admin + fund management fees
benefits & features: Protection + investment growth, long-term wealth planning

Name: BI-FAST Transfer
description: Real-time low-cost interbank transfer system in Indonesia.
fees: Usually IDR 2,500 or free (bank dependent)
benefits & features: Fast 24/7 transfers, cheaper than RTGS, instant settlement

Name: RTGS Transfer
description: High-value real-time gross settlement transfer for large amounts.
fees: Fixed fee per transfer
benefits & features: Secure large transfers, used for corporate/high-value payments

Name: SWIFT International Transfer
description: Send money abroad via SWIFT network.
price: IDR 50,000 (telex fee) + USD 20 (full-amount fee) + correspondent/foreign bank charges
fees: Additional foreign bank charges apply
benefits & features: Global transfers, multi-currency support

Name: QRIS Payment
description: Scan-to-pay QR payment system used across Indonesia.
fees: Merchant fee applies (paid by merchant)
benefits & features: Cashless payments, widely accepted, instant payment

Name: Cash Withdrawal (ATM Network)
description: Withdraw cash from BCA or partner ATMs.
price: Free at BCA ATM; fee at others
fees: Free at BCA ATMs; ~IDR 7,500 at ATM Prima/Bersama; ~IDR 25,000 at international ATM Cirrus network
benefits & features: 24/7 cash access, nationwide ATM network

Name: myBCA
description: Primary modern banking app for managing accounts, cards, and transactions.
fees: No usage fees
benefits & features: Unified banking dashboard, transfers, QRIS, card controls, investment access

Name: BCA Mobile
description: Traditional mobile banking app for transfers and payments.
fees: Standard transaction fees apply
benefits & features: Transfers, bill payments, top-ups, QR payments

Name: KlikBCA
description: Web-based banking platform for desktop users.
fees: Transaction fees apply per service
benefits & features: Full banking access via browser, transfers, payments

Name: BCA Mobile Authentication
description: In-app authentication feature (biometric login, KeyBCA soft token) built into myBCA — not a separately branded product.
benefits & features: Transaction verification, fraud protection, login approval

Name: Card Control (Block/Unblock)
description: In-app feature ("Kontrol Kartu Kredit") inside myBCA/BCA Mobile to freeze or activate cards instantly — not a standalone product.
benefits & features: Fraud protection, instant card control, loss prevention

Name: QRIS Scanner (BCA)
description: In-app QR scan-to-pay feature inside myBCA/BCA Mobile (same underlying QRIS network as QRIS Payment) — not a separate standalone product.
fees: Merchant fee only
benefits & features: Cashless payments, widely accepted in Indonesia

Name: e-Statement Service
description: Monthly digital bank statements accessible via app.
benefits & features: Paperless statements, downloadable history, audit tracking

Name: Push Notifications (Transaction Alerts)
description: Real-time notifications for account activity.
benefits & features: Fraud detection, instant transaction alerts
